title: shared-github-actions reusable workflow inventory
objective: Catalog the reusable workflows shipped from the shared CI repository so consumer repositories can wire them with confidence.

workflows.name: reusable-results-guard
workflows.purpose: Validate that consumer repositories produce a non-template RESULTS.md and at least one raw JSON file.

workflows.name: reusable-pages-smoke
workflows.purpose: Smoke check the deployed Pages baseline plus an optional fallback query string.
